# Keyframe Toolbox

> Keyframe Toolbox finally brings a true graph editor with advanced animation controls into Final Cut Pro.

- [Keyframe Toolbox](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/readme.md): Keyframe Toolbox
- [Buy on Mac App Store](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/buy.md): Keyframe Toolbox is a one-time payment of USD$19.99 on the Mac App Store.
- [Educational Pricing](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/educational.md): Educational institutions can get a 50% discount when they purchase 20 or more copies through Apple School Manager.
- [System Requirements](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/system-requirements.md): ScriptStar requires Final Cut Pro 10.6.5 or later.
- [How To Use](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use/readme.md): This section contains all the information you need to get up-and-running with Keyframe Toolbox.
- [Support](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/support.md): If you run into any bugs, crashes, or you have a feature request, you can post an issue here.
- [Release Notes](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/release-notes.md): 🎉 Released:
- [Uninstall](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/uninstall.md): To uninstall Keyframe Toolbox, simply drag the application to the trash/bin.
- [Credits](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/credits.md): Keyframe Toolbox has been created by Iain Anderson and Chris Hocking.
- [Privacy Policy](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/privacy.md): This is the privacy policy for the Keyframe Toolbox, macOS Application that is available on the macOS App Store and TestFlight.

## How To Use

- [Installation](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use/installation.md): You can download Keyframe Toolbox from the Mac App Store.
- [Introducing Keyframe Toolbox](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use/introducing-keyframe-toolbox.md): This effect is built to let you use familiar Bezier keyframes and handles to control common properties in Final Cut Pro.
- [Preparing still images](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use/preparing-still-images.md): If you're working with regular video clips in the same aspect ratio as your canvas, you won't have any problems. You also probably won't have any problems if you're working in a different aspect ratio, and have set Spatial Conform to Fill.
- [Keyframe graph basics](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use/keyframe-graph-basics.md): Keyframes remember values at points in time.
- [Resetting and scaling the graphs](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use/resetting-and-scaling-the-graphs.md): Each graph can be reset, zoomed horizontally, and shown in one of three vertical sizes.
- [Adding and moving keyframes](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use/adding-and-moving-keyframes.md): Keyframes can be moved and new keyframes can be added.
- [Non-linear (smooth) keyframes](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use/non-linear-smooth-keyframes.md): Handles connected to keyframes control the graph curve that controls how one value changes into another.
- [Deleting keyframes and handles](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use/deleting-keyframes-and-handles.md): Keyframes and handles can be deleted.
- [Working with precision](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use/working-with-precision.md): Exact numbers can be entered for keyframes and handles.
- [Selecting, moving and scaling keyframes](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use/selecting-moving-and-scaling-keyframes.md): Multiple keyframes can be selected and manipulated.
- [Using the graph menu](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use/using-the-graph-menu.md): Each graph has a menu that enables some advanced features.
- [Presets](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use/presets.md): To create flexible keyframe graphs based on common animation patterns.
- [Custom Presets](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use/custom-presets.md): To store, re-use and share any graph. New in v1.1
- [Easing](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use/easing.md): Allowing predictable curve patterns to be used across one or more keyframes. New in v1.1
- [Before First Keyframe and After Last Keyframe](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use/before-first-keyframe-and-after-last-keyframe.md): To control a virtual keyframe graph beyond the first and last keyframes.
- [Settings](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use/settings.md): Settings gives access to advanced features.
- [Sample Animations](https://keyframetoolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use/sample-animations.md): Some examples of the kinds of animations you can create with Keyframe Toolbox. Think of this is a cheat sheet that links the kinds of instructions you might get from a client with the kinds of curves you'd need to make it happen.
